title: Create social media and communication hub with chat, video calls, and content sharing

requirements.text: Create user authentication system using Internet Identity for secure login and user session management
acceptanceCriteria: Users can register and login using Internet Identity
User sessions persist across page refreshes
Authenticated users have unique identities stored in the backend

requirements.text: Implement user profile system with username, profile photo, and bio information that can be created and edited
acceptanceCriteria: Users can create and update their profile with username and bio
Profile photos can be uploaded and displayed
Profiles are stored persistently in the backend
Users can view their own and other users' profiles

requirements.text: Build a text-based messaging system where authenticated users can send and receive messages in real-time with other users

quotes: Instant messaging with text, voice memos, and stickers

acceptanceCriteria: Users can send text messages to other users
Messages are displayed in chronological order
Message history persists in the backend
Users can view their conversation history with other users
New messages appear without requiring page refresh

requirements.text: Create a photo and video post sharing system where users can upload images and videos with captions to share with other users

quotes: Photo and video sharing with filters, effects, and AR capabilities

acceptanceCriteria: Users can upload photos and videos from their device
Posts include caption text and timestamp
Posts are stored in the backend and associated with the user who created them
Users can view a feed of posts from all users

requirements.text: Implement a Stories feature where users can post ephemeral content (photos/videos) that automatically disappears after 24 hours

quotes: Stories and ephemeral content that disappear after 24 hours

acceptanceCriteria: Users can create story posts with images and text
Stories are displayed separately from regular posts
Stories automatically expire and are removed 24 hours after creation
Users can view active stories from other users
Story timestamp shows time remaining before expiration

requirements.text: Create a content feed that displays posts from all users in reverse chronological order with infinite scroll

quotes: User-generated content feeds, with AI-driven suggestions and content discovery

acceptanceCriteria: Feed displays all user posts sorted by newest first
Posts show username, profile photo, caption, image/video, and timestamp
Infinite scroll loads more posts as user scrolls down
Feed updates when new posts are created

requirements.text: Implement like and comment functionality on posts where users can like posts and add text comments
acceptanceCriteria: Users can like/unlike posts with a heart icon
Like count is displayed on each post
Users can add text comments to posts
Comments display with username and timestamp
All interactions persist in the backend

requirements.text: Create privacy controls allowing users to set their profile and posts to public or private visibility

quotes: Users can control privacy settings, audience visibility, and post visibility

acceptanceCriteria: Users have privacy settings in their profile (public/private)
Private profiles only show content to approved followers
Users can set individual post visibility settings
Privacy settings are enforced by backend queries

requirements.text: Implement a follow/unfollow system where users can follow other users and view a following/followers list
acceptanceCriteria: Users can follow and unfollow other users
Follow relationships are stored in the backend
Users can view their followers and following lists
Follower and following counts are displayed on profiles

requirements.text: Create a user search feature that allows searching for other users by username
acceptanceCriteria: Users can search for other users by typing username
Search results display matching usernames with profile photos
Clicking a result navigates to that user's profile
Search is performed in the backend

requirements.text: Implement a notification system that alerts users about likes, comments, new followers, and messages

quotes: Smart notifications and reminders, adjusting to user behavior and preferences

acceptanceCriteria: Notifications are generated for likes, comments, follows, and new messages
Users can view a list of all notifications
Unread notification count is displayed
Notifications can be marked as read
Notifications persist in the backend

requirements.text: Create a reporting system where users can report inappropriate posts or users with reason categories

quotes: Reporting and feedback system with AI to improve user experience

acceptanceCriteria: Users can report posts or profiles with a report button
Report form includes reason categories (spam, harassment, inappropriate content, etc.)
Reports are stored in the backend with reporter identity, target, and reason
Reported content is flagged for review

requirements.text: Design and implement a modern, mobile-first UI with a vibrant gradient color scheme (coral to purple), rounded card components, smooth animations, and a clean Instagram-inspired layout with bottom navigation
acceptanceCriteria: UI uses a coral-to-purple gradient color palette consistently
Components have rounded corners and subtle shadows for depth
Smooth transitions and animations enhance user interactions
Bottom navigation bar provides quick access to main features
Layout is responsive and mobile-optimized
Typography is clean and legible with proper hierarchy

requirements.text: Render generated images for app branding and UI elements from frontend/public/assets/generated as static assets throughout the application
acceptanceCriteria: Generated images are loaded from frontend/public/assets/generated
Images are displayed in appropriate locations (logo in header, placeholders, backgrounds)
Images maintain proper aspect ratios and responsive sizing
No backend calls are made to serve these static assets

constraints: Do not implement real-time WebSocket communication as it is not supported
Do not integrate third-party AI services like OpenAI or Anthropic
Do not implement voice calling or video calling as real-time communication is not supported
Do not integrate with external social media platforms (Instagram, Snapchat) as these APIs are not supported
Do not implement push notifications as they are not supported
Do not use external authentication providers; use Internet Identity only
Do not implement AR filters or effects as these require external libraries not supported
Do not implement voice memos or audio recording features
All backend logic must reside in a single Motoko actor file

Frontend must not modify immutable paths: frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.ts, frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.tsx, frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts, frontend/src/main.tsx, frontend/src/components/ui
nonGoals: Real-time WebSocket-based chat or live updates
Voice calling, video calling, or audio communication
Integration with third-party social media APIs
AR filters, face effects, or camera filters
AI-powered content moderation using external AI services
AI-generated captions, music suggestions, or automated content creation
Sticker packs or animated emoji features
Advanced photo/video editing tools beyond basic uploads

required: Modern gradient app logo with 'Yasa' text in vibrant coral-to-purple gradient colors (logo.dim_256x256.png)
Abstract wave pattern background in soft coral and purple tones for hero section (hero-background.dim_1920x1080.png)
Simple user avatar placeholder icon in neutral gray (avatar-placeholder.dim_128x128.png)
Camera icon for post creation button in white with subtle shadow (camera-icon.dim_64x64.png)
Heart icon for like button in coral color (heart-icon.dim_48x48.png)
Chat bubble icon for messaging in purple (chat-icon.dim_48x48.png)
